data.title: TEST: Post Hero
data.content:
<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Default - Page Accent Color","description":"Post Hero with default settings: page accent color for gradient, excerpt hidden, all auto-populated fields visible."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/post-hero /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"With Excerpt Shown","description":"Post Hero with showExcerpt enabled to display the post excerpt between title and metadata."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/post-hero {"showExcerpt":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Topic Accent Color Override","description":"Post Hero using the topic's accent color for the gradient system instead of the page accent color."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/post-hero {"useTopicColor":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Full Options - Excerpt + Topic Color","description":"Post Hero with both showExcerpt and useTopicColor enabled."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/post-hero {"showExcerpt":true,"useTopicColor":true} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->
